fv_targets.notes: Key theorem: welfordFold_mean proved by induction. mean_step_algebra: (m+(x-m)/(n+1))*(n+1) = m*n+x. M2 sorry blocked by @[irreducible] Rat.inv. Fix: needs Mathlib or prove Rat.inv_nonneg manually for nat-cast denominators.

fv_targets.status: research only - omega for index arithmetic

bugs_found.description: signNoZero<float> returns 0 for NaN, violates ne_zero. Loop callers: rtl_direct_mission_land.cpp:73, mission_base.cpp:80 get step=0 (infinite loop risk). TECS.cpp:198, FlightTaskOrbit.cpp:138 get 0 (incorrect sign).

notes: Rat.sub_add_cancel/Rat.sub_self: IMPLICIT args - use bare (no obvious args)
Rat.add_le_add_right: shared term on RIGHT (a+c <= b+c). For left-shared: add_comm first.
x^0=1: use 'have h0 := by simp' (simp knows pow_zero)
Rat.add_le_add_left: c+a <= c+b iff a<=b (note: c on LEFT)
AlphaFilter ge_sample fix: use Rat.neg_le_neg on (alpha*(state-sample) <= state-sample), then rewrite -(alpha*(state-sample)) = alpha*(sample-state) using <- Rat.mul_neg + Rat.neg_sub
AlphaFilter iterate_formula fix: use 'induction n generalizing state' (NOT plain induction)
CI at .github/workflows/lean-ci.yml - working, no Mathlib deps needed
WelfordMean mean_step_algebra: (m+(x-m)/(n+1))*(n+1) = m*n+x; key: Rat.div_mul_cancel hn + Rat.mul_add
WelfordMean natCast_succ: use simp [Rat.natCast_add, show (↑(1:Nat):Rat)=1 from by decide]
WelfordMean natCast_add_one_ne_zero: use Rat.ne_of_gt (which gives b≠a from a<b)
WelfordMean rat_mul_self_nonneg: use @Rat.le_total 0 a (le_total has implicit args only!)
WelfordMean foldl mean helper: key step - rw [hperm, ih_s]; simp only [welfordUpdate, natCast_succ]; rw [mean_step_algebra]
WelfordMean M2 sorry: delta*(x-newMean) = delta^2*count/(count+1) >= 0; blocked by @[irreducible] Rat.inv (no Rat.div_nonneg in core); fix: use Mathlib or prove Rat.inv_pos for positive Rat
WelfordMean from_init: need natCast_succ 0 to prove x/(↑0+1) = x (can't use decide on Rat.add/inv)
